intents.mountIntent: Map the trace dataset, then derive a useful debugging summary intent

derivedIntent.name: debugTraceSummary
derivedIntent.description: After probing the trace dataset, summarize debugging-related trace rows with row-index evidence.

intents.mountIntent: Understand what workflow and activity shapes this trace dataset can expose

derivedIntent.name: traceActivityShapeMap
derivedIntent.description: Map visible activity/task fields and summarize which trace activities are represented.

intents.mountIntent: Explore the dataset categories and derive a documentation or review activity summary if supported

derivedIntent.name: reviewDocsTraceSummary
derivedIntent.description: Summarize review/documentation-related traces when those categories are visible in search results.
